messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- ABNB: growth archetype
- ABT: growth archetype
- ACN: growth archetype
- AEE: growth archetype
- AEP: growth archetype
- ALB: growth archetype
- AOS: growth archetype
- GOOG: growth archetype
- SBAC: growth archetype
- SNA: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: RTX Stock Analysis: NYSE RTX Performance And Aerospace Defense Sector Trends (vatvP3WzbA) - fathomjournal.org
    Summary: RTX Stock Analysis: NYSE RTX Performance And Aerospace Defense Sector Trends (vatvP3WzbA) fathomjournal.org

[1] Title: Telecom equipment stock surges 111% in 5 weeks; zooms 511% in 1 year - Business Standard
    Summary: Telecom equipment stock surges 111% in 5 weeks; zooms 511% in 1 year Business Standard

[2] Title: Nvidia funds construction of Corning plants, in addition to equity investment By Reuters - Investing.com
    Summary: Nvidia funds construction of Corning plants, in addition to equity investment By Reuters Investing.com

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Article discusses RTX (Raytheon) which is not a held position in the portfolio."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Article discusses an unnamed telecom equipment stock with no mention of SBAC (SBA Communications), the only telecom-related position held."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Article discusses Nvidia and Corning but neither ticker is in the portfolio; no connection to GOOG or any other held position."
  }
]
```
